title: refactor(social): delete completed migration scripts and dead helpers
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Delete completed one-shot migrate_social_history.py + validate_social_history.py (date-locked to 2026-03, zero workflow/doc/script callers)
- Remove 6 unused buffer_utils helpers/aliases (get_buffer_profiles, get_profile_by_service, create_buffer_update, publish_to_buffer, format_linkedin_post, format_twitter_post) + their orphaned section comments
- Remove dead PR-creation cluster in common.py (create_branch_from_main, create_or_update_pr, _apply_pr_labels) — pipeline commits to news branch, never opens PRs
- Drop speculative call_pollinations_api params (verbose, exit_on_failure, model, max_retries) and strip exit_on_failure=False from all 8 call sites; inline MODEL/MAX_RETRIES constants
- Delete dead WEBSEARCH_MODEL constant and unused get_date_range helper (+ now-dead datetime/timedelta/timezone import)

Risks: none — pure dead-code removal. All deleted symbols had zero callers (verified by repo-wide grep); call_pollinations_api behavior is identical for every remaining caller (same model, retry count, None-on-failure); all 8 call sites updated atomically in this commit so no TypeError. The separate .github/scripts/pr_comment_review.py copy of call_pollinations_api is untouched.

_~1195 net lines removed · biome ✓ · No Python test suite exists. Ran `python3 -m py_compile` on all 7 edited .py files (common ✓_

gist.headline: Trimming the dead leaves
gist.blurb: We swept through the social media pipeline and cleared out over a thousand lines of dead code, unused helpers, and completed migration scripts. A lighter codebase makes for a happier hive.
gist.summary: Removed ~1,195 lines of dead code from the social pipeline, including completed migration scripts, unused Buffer helpers, and dead PR-creation functions.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup simplifies the social media automation scripts and reduces maintenance overhead without affecting any user-facing features.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature cleaning up a digital garden. Nomnom eating old code documents, Polly sweeping up dead leaves.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot sweeping up fallen brown leaves and old crumpled paper code snippets in a digital garden. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of old documents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
